ι : Type u_1

N : Type u_4
inst✝⁵ : CommRing R
inst✝⁴ : AddCommGroup M
inst✝³ : Module R M
inst✝² : AddCommGroup N
inst✝¹ : Module R N
P : RootPairing ι R M N
inst✝ : CharZero R
⊢ Submodule.span R
      (Set.range
        ⇑({ toFun := List.get RootPairing.EmbeddedG2.allCoeffs, inj' := ⋯ }.trans
            { toFun := fun x => Int.cast ∘ x, inj' := ⋯ })) =
    ⊤

proof:
rw [eq_top_iff]
    intro x _
    refine span_mono (range_subset_iff.mpr fun i ↦ ?_) ?_
    simp only [SetLike.mem_coe, Submodule.mem_span_range_iff_exists_fun]
    refine ⟨fun j ↦ if j = 0 then x 0 else x 1, ?_⟩
    ext i
    fin_cases i <;> simp

end Concrete

end RootPairing
